title: Time After Time
meaning_summary: Its emotional clarity and melodic simplicity help the song remain easy to revisit and commercially stable over time.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming drives repeat listening and steady long-tail value.
Its emotional accessibility supports rediscovery across generations.
Film and television placements help extend its commercial life.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Time After Time is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
